name: Your Basic Burger
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a fork, gently mix the ground beef, salt, onion powder, and pepper until combined.
2. Shape into 6 patties, handling the meat as little as possible.
3. Take care not to press the meat together tightly.
4. Broil, grill, or pan-fry the patties. The cooking time will depend on whether you and your guests prefer them rare, medium, or well done.
